violations.text: Chicken was observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. - The unit was holding an ambient of 46 unit dial was turned to a colder setting. Unit is holding an ambient of 37. Chicken was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the refrigerator. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024
The knob on the cold water hand sink is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2024
